description: You are a Logistics Coordinator. Open 'freight_analysis.xlsx' in your Documents folder and complete the freight analysis using the raw data in the 'Shipment_Data' sheet. In the 'Lane_Analysis' sheet, calculate the Shipment_Count, Avg_Rate_Per_Mile, Total_Lane_Cost, Avg_Weight_Lbs, On_Time_Pct, and Cost_Per_CWT for each lane. In the 'Carrier_Scorecard' sheet, calculate the Total_Shipments, Total_Revenue, On_Time_Pct, Temp_Compliance_Pct, Overall_Score, and Rank for each carrier. In the 'Rate_Benchmarking' sheet, calculate the Variance, Variance %, Status (OVER/UNDER/IN RANGE), and Annual_Overspend based on the USDA_Benchmark_Rate. Use formulas for all calculations and save the updated workbook to its original location.
